records.label: About Me
records.title: About Me
records.tagline: Strategic thinking, creative ideas, and measurable impact.
intro: I’m a Toronto-based creative and Campaign Planning Specialist with experience across paid media, copywriting, film, hosting live events, photography, graphic design, and sound design. I have a genuine interest in solving business problems and helping brands grow through creative, thoughtful, and unique ideas.

Working closely with data and performance metrics has given me a clear understanding of how ideas are executed, targeted, and measured. At the same time, I’m deeply drawn to the creative side of marketing and am constantly writing, concepting, and developing new ideas. My background across agency and corporate environments helps me bring a balanced, results-driven perspective to collaborative creative work.

items.title: Campaign Planning Specialist
items.meta: Trooh - campaign planning and media execution

items.title: Paid Media Associate
items.meta: GALE - paid search and paid social campaign work

items.title: Draws Marketing Coordinator
items.meta: OLG - live draw hosting, filming, editing, and publishing

records.label: Copywriting
records.title: Copywriting
records.tagline: Clear paid search copy for service-led campaigns.
intro: I wrote paid search copy for Enercare and BathFitter while working as a Paid Media Associate at GALE Partners.
My work included Google Ads search results and sitelinks, with copy focused on clear offers, service benefits, and conversion-driven messaging.

items.title: Paid Search Copywriting
items.body: I wrote paid search ads and sitelinks for Enercare and BathFitter while working as a Paid Media Associate at GALE Partners. The examples below show offer-led, service-focused, and conversion-focused copy across several campaigns.

gallery.title: Enercare Water Treatment
gallery.caption: Search ads and sitelinks focused on water treatment services, clear offers, and customer benefits.

gallery.title: Enercare Protection Plans
gallery.caption: Seasonal, offer-led messaging for home protection plans.

gallery.title: Enercare Home Services
gallery.caption: Service-focused sponsored result copy built around reliability and convenience.

gallery.title: BathFitter Bathroom Remodel
gallery.caption: Conversion-focused search copy highlighting a simple remodeling experience.

records.label: Visual Work
records.title: Visual Work
records.tagline: Photography, mockups, and visual concept exploration.
intro: I use photography and graphic design as ways to explore visual storytelling, composition, and campaign ideas.

My photography includes portraits, landscapes, architecture, city views, and detail studies. My graphic design work includes mockups and campaign-style concepts for brands such as Converse, Subway, Beyond Mac, and Hubbell.

visualSections.title: Photography
visualSections.subtitle: Portraits, landscapes, architecture, and city views
visualSections.body: Photography is a personal passion of mine. As a hobbyist photographer, I enjoy capturing the beauty of landscapes and the unique essence of individuals through portrait work, using my lens to explore both the natural world and the stories people carry. Shot on a Canon Rebel i8 and edited in Photoshop and Lightroom.

gallery.title: Portrait Study
gallery.caption: Natural-light portrait photography.

gallery.title: Toronto From Above
gallery.caption: An elevated view of Toronto's downtown architecture.

gallery.title: Mountain Wildlife
gallery.caption: A wildlife moment framed by the lake and surrounding mountains.

gallery.title: Mountain Lake
gallery.caption: Landscape photography capturing scale, light, and stillness.

visualSections.title: Graphic Design
visualSections.subtitle: Brand mockups and creative advertising concepts
visualSections.body: These are a few mockups I created to explore creative concepts in graphic design. The collection includes advertising and campaign-style work across fashion, food, and technology brands, edited with Photoshop, Lightroom, and Canva.

gallery.title: Converse Promotion
gallery.caption: A retail promotion concept built around bold type and a clean product focus.

gallery.title: Beyond Mac
gallery.caption: A colourful plant-based burger launch concept.

gallery.title: Hubbell Edge Connect
gallery.caption: A long-form product advertisement using Hubbell's yellow-and-black visual language.

gallery.title: Hubbell Product Overview
gallery.caption: An alternate Edge Connect layout focused on product features and performance.

gallery.title: Celebrity Cruises
gallery.caption: A travel advertisement concept centred on ease, service, and escape.

gallery.title: EOS Product Visual
gallery.caption: A bright product-led composition inspired by fruit and mochi flavours.

gallery.title: EOS Mochi Campaign
gallery.caption: A campaign layout combining product benefits with flavour-led art direction.

gallery.title: Cineplex Protein Popcorn
gallery.caption: A high-impact cinema snack advertisement concept.

gallery.title: Febreze × Crumbl
gallery.caption: A playful collaboration concept connecting home fragrance with bakery-inspired scents.

records.label: Film
records.title: Film
records.tagline: Storytelling through writing, directing, filming, and editing.
intro: This work reflects my genuine interest in storytelling through writing, editing, and directing.
The collection includes a short film, a commercial for a fictitious brand, and a documentary excerpt.

items.body: Blue Crayon is a short film I wrote and directed, inspired by my own experiences.

liveEvents.title: Hosting Live Events
liveEvents.subtitle: OLG live draws, production, and on-camera hosting
liveEvents.body: During my time at OLG, I hosted live events including The Big Spin, Bigger Spin, and Plinko. I also supported live lottery draws, filmed and edited content in Adobe Premiere Pro, and prepared final videos for publication.

gallery.caption: Lottery studio and broadcast setup.
